entry.title: Episode 11. Beach Shutdown.
entry.content:
Lydia was driving the bike toward south.
Upon tandem seat Yuuyami with backpack behind.
Being motorcycle maintain one hundred kilometres per hour, they expect to reach seashore in thirty minutes.
Ultimately, rain continued six days straight.
However, Lydia didn’t complain. As the reason, she was absorbed in project of building Maker Factory.
The pair instructed ten toil AD to advance construction of Maker Factory, and departed library first thing in the morning.
After sea viewing, they plan to return to library at noon, get through with lunch, and head to Rapha.
Approximately twenty-five minutes after pair left library. They went beyond the area of forty kilometres radius, explored afore by Yuuyami.
Familiar parched​ land gradually grew to blend with different colours.
Under the bed of sky-blue, vibrates olive, pea green, white and deep peach colours.
That was incredible paysage.
Lydia slows down and stopped motorcycle.

“Vegetation​?”

Murmurs Lydia.

“So it seems. I shall collect a sample.”

Accompanied by Lydia, Yuuyami got off the motorcycle.
Upon dismounting the bike, somehow feeling was different from usual.
Lydia looked down her feet, beneath her boots sprouts grass could be found.
So this a sensation of grass, judged Lydia.
With following, “Amazing-!” rising of voice

“What is it?” Asked Yuuyami.
“Eh? Er, because there’s plants​?”
“Not a question, just a bit ambiguous?”
“Um. Somehow, I thought it was amazing so I unintentionally said it, I wonder if that was a reason.”
“I see.”

Yuuyami removed her backpack and take out a vial for samples.
Thereon, crouches down and collected just a one deep-pink flower.
Lifting the picked flower high up to degree she could see sun through, Yuuyami firmly fixed her gazed upon it.

“Armeria maritima.”1
“What kind of flower is this?”
“Originally, flower growing wild at the coast and is very durable.”
“Durable?”
“Yes. Probably be better to paraphrase it as drought-tolerant.”
“Whichsoever it is.”

Giggled Lydia and crouches down.
Whereafter, reached out her hand to ascertain a tactile sensation of the grass.

“Hey stop,” says Yuuyami.
“Eh?” Lydia looked over her shoulder.

Yuuyami put thrift in the vial and closed its cap.

“Being that some plants might hold a virulence, please refrain from touching it thoughtlessly.”
“Eh-? I want to touch it-“
“Please, await my recognition. I shall perform it in a moment​.”

With that said, Yuuyami shifts her gaze to grass which Lydia tried to touch.

“Yes, alright. You may touch it without any problems.”

It was truly a moment. Took less than second.

“Wha-i.”

Coming into contact with grass, Lydia enjoyed sensation whereas holding it between her fingers, stroking, and tracing it.
In such way Lydia played with grass for a short while.

“You seem having fun, aren’t you,” said Yuuyami.
“Uh-huh. I’m touching a living plant for the first time.”

Albeit usual salad of Lydia diet also consist of plants, that just a reproduction. Therein no consciousness nor life.

“Hey-, Yuuyami, plants are amazing, aren’t they?”
“Why?”
“To survive even under destroyed world.”
“Yes, your truth.”
“Plants have consciousness as well, right?”
“It is not. These are primitive organisms.”
“Well then,” Lydia stands up. “Is it possible for plants to evolve into intelligent life-forms such as us?”
“That would be a little arduous, isn’t it?”
“Impossible?”
“I am not ready to make assertions. Append it as new project?”
“Um―m,” Lydia displayed thoughtful gesture. “More or less, well let’s add it. However priority should be low, I guess.”
“Understood.”
“In addition, how about beautifully landscaping library environs?”
“Sounds good. Paysage is important. However present landscape resembling a burnt field are not evoke my loathe likewise.”
“Burnt field!?”
“It is a metaphor,” Yuuyami tilts her head.
“I know that, but burnt field,” Lydia smiles.
“Is it bizarre?”
“Rather than bizarre, um―m, it was amusing for me, I feel.”
“Is that so. That was not my intention, however I consider it good in case of it being amusing.”
“Uh-huh. Keep saying such from now on either.”
“Remarks which would unintentionally entertain Lydia?”
“That would be difficult, just a bizarre metaphors.”
“Yet it was bizarre after all.”

Yuuyami tittered, together with her giggled Lydia.
Upon that time, a gust of wind​ passed through,
living under the perished world plants shook.
Ah, they are laughed together with us, thought Lydia.
She felt akin to being blessed by the world.

 

◇

 

“Amazing! Blue! Crispy! Water!”

Immediately after arriving at the sea, Yuuyami calmly admired Lydia dismount the motorcycle and was frolicking around.
Simultaneously​, verifying Lydia’s expressions.
Blue refer to the sea, crispy sensation of sandy beach whereupon Lydia was jumping. Latter, the water, would be exactly the sea, concluded Yuuyami.

“Oh-, silky!”

Lydia scooped sand with both of her hands and watched it spilling through the gaps between her fingers.
Spilled sand reflect a sunlight, was sparkling and shining.
When all the sand spilled, Lydia scooped it again with both hands.
Thus, once again it was spilling from gaps between her fingers.

“You seem having fun, aren’t you.”
“Uh-huh!”

Lydia grew a smile.

“Today bring lots of joy.”

Yuuyami removed backpack and take out container, aiming to bring back seawater.
And then, upon her rising a face,
Lydia was running.
Straight towards the water.

“Eh?”

She weren’t able to properly comprehend reason of Lydia run.
Is she wishing to draw near the sea, or something, wondered Yuuyami.
Lydia jumped.
Head towards​ the water.
Human beings cannot fly aloft to the sky. However, feasibly, in case of new human breed, for them it may be possible to fly. Upon following instant of Yuuyami consideration the possibility.
Lydia fell into sea with especially great splash.

“Lydia!?”

Likewise new humans cannot fly, calmly analyses Yuuyami.
Yes, whereas that expected to be calm analysis.
Simultaneously​ with calling Lydia’s name, she found herself running, tossing container away.
Upon such realisation however, she has no intentions of stoppage.
At occasion of Yuuyami arrival to foreshore​ with velocity twice as high as Lydia,

“Uwah-! Cold! Salty! Clammy-!”

girl vigorously​ rushed out the water.

“Are you alright? You are not get injured?”

Yuuyami offers right hand.

“I’m not hurt.”

Trembling Lydia shook her head, whereupon took Yuuyami’ hand.
Yuuyami lifted​ Lydia up.

“But it’s awfully cold…”

Lydia let go of Yuuyami’s hand and hugged shoulders with both arms.

“Current season is not suitable for swimming. Likewise for breaking into the water in clothes, I believe.”

During saying these words, Yuuyami began removing her maid wear.

“Why are you undressing?”
“You undress likewise, Lydia, please. I shall adjust my cooling system to raise your body temperature.”
“Er?”
“Your body grew cold, am I wrong? I do not believe it is agreeable to leave you in such condition, thus I shall warm you up.”
“Like a soup?”
“I have no memory of warming up a soup.”

Being re-emerged against simple Food Maker soup, warm from the beginning.

“It’s jest-“

Lydia also begins to undress.
Yuuyami spread out maid clothes upon sandy beach whereat she sat down.

“Yuuyami body’s so smooth.”

Lydia firmly gazes at Yuuyami.

“So it is. Being that it’s not having installed unnecessary organs. Well, it is holds a potential of attaching them later. I am also compatible with SA series pseudo-genitalia. However before that, please quickly undress.”
“Wait, I’ll take it off now.”
“Please hand it over to me afterwards.”
“Okay-“

Lydia obediently stripped and passes her clothes.
Yuuyami folded Lydia’ clothes and put them behind. Being that maid outfit is also there, Lydia’ garments shouldn’t get sandy.
When Lydia warms up, as following I have to dry her outfit, thought Yuuyami.

“What is SA series?”

Removed every single piece of her clothing, Lydia sat down in petan and clings to Yuuyami.
Yuuyami returns Lydia a gentle embrace.

“Sex Assist. Series for satisfy humans’ sexual desire.”
“Sounds like Rapha would hate this series.”
“Might be so.”

Yuuyami caresses Lydia’s back with both hands.

“Although Yuuyami warms me up, it might be a little hot.”
“Pardon me. I shall slightly reduce my body temperature.”
“Thank you.”
“It is okay. I do not wish you to get a cold burn​.”

Whereas saying, Yuuyami stroked Lydia’s hair with her fingers being a comb.
Of course, with aim to dry it.
Lydia closed her eyes in beatitude.
For a while, pair were clinging one to another in such manner.
When all of sudden, Yuuyami found herself surrender the feeling resembling a dream.
Despite never seeing dreams.
But, this, this is reality,
or perhaps a dream, she wondered.
Possibly I am within an everlasting, protracted, dream.
Supposing it being sooth, I’m begging, please do not wake up.
I am blissed.

“Yuuyami, is it enough yet?” Asked Lydia.
“So it is.”

Repatriated inward the material world, Yuuyami parting her hands of Lydia.

“Now I’m warmed up. Thank you. I love you.”

These are frequent words of Lydia, she loves Yuuyami. Yuuyami often responds as: “Me also.”
That is the usual case. Nothing exceptional can be found there. As though mere confirmation of importance to each other.
However, today was different.
Afore Yuuyami could open her mouth to reply, Lydia’ lips comes into contact with Yuuyami’s.
I am being kissed, immediate understanding.
And now,
upon the time of comprehension, tempestuous​ emotions takes their way whereas bustling about​ within Yuuyami.
This is―!?
Feels similar to being pierced through. As though being stabbed. Momentum is too great.
As though upon the verge of melting. Tender emotions. Calm impulse.
Inconsistency. Emotions inconsistency.
I cannot understand. I cannot processed. I cannot dealt with it. Emotions being too great. Too complex.
I do not understand its definition.
Emotions occupied her quantum brain, going throughout the body​, albeit as yet aren’t subside.

“Yuuyami… it hurts…”

Lydia’ voice. Lydia’ voice.
Lydia’ voice is audible.
At the same time, emotions grew a beyond intense. Throughout, throughout, ad infinitum.
As though trying to reach the edge of universe.

“I, it… hur…”

Before realising, Yuuyami was tightly embosoming Lydia.
Strongly embosoming.
I cannot perceive the reason. I do not remember giving such command to my arms.
Moreover, the amount of force,
being me continue to hug with such force, Lydia would break.
No, no, that’s not― The one to break would be me.
I have to separate. Separate of Lydia.
I shall not. I shall not be apart from Lydia.
Contradiction. Instructions are contradicted. Thoughts are inconsistent. Each and everything is inconsistent.
I do not understand. I do not understand.
It hurts.
Overloaded with emotions, Yuuyami’ quantum brain being overflown.
System is going down. Shutting down.
I have to release Lydia prior it to happen.
Despite this, arms aren’t receiving commands.
I do not wish it. I do not wish to murder Lydia.

“Aaaaahh-!”

Yuuyami let out beast-esque voice.
I shall rather destroy myself than murder Lydia.
The sole truth. Mere this a truth.
Within the chaos of emotion contradictions, mere this veritable.
Therefore, I have to release.
Whatever it takes,
whatever it takes,
although Lydia being adorable and we are inseparable.
Ah-, so that is the reason― Yuuyami were able to find a name of emotion just prior the shutdown.
Whereas at great pains, she cognised.
As the setting sun, as the dimming light,
consciousness of Yuuyami was physically cut off.

  1. same as thrift, Armeria maritima - Wikipedia; back

category.term: Autodoll Dreams in a Decaying World
webnovel translation

entry.summary: Lydia was driving the bike toward south. Upon tandem seat Yuuyami with backpack behind.

entry.title: Episode 10. White Map.
entry.content:
Today it has been raining since the morning.
However not mere potsu-potsu, but zaa-zaa.1
Looked forward to sea trip Lydia, now being crestfallen and sits upon the library floor.

“Why-, it’s raining now-“

Lydia let out a sigh.

“There is days like that.”

Said Yuuyami, whereas brushing Lydia’s hair.

“I wanted to go to the sea-“
“Let us go tomorrow.”
“What if it rains tomorrow?”
“Let us go the day after tomorrow.”
“What if it rains the day after tomorrow?”
“Let us construct a car.”
“I like motorcycles better-“
“Why?”
“Hm―” Lydia inclined her head.

There no definite pretext in particular. Nonetheless, If her forced to answer,

“Is it because motorbike’s, cooler?”
“That is a question for me?”
“No. It’s just a bit ambiguous.”
“I see.”

Indifferently said Yuuyami, and continued combing Lydia’s hair.
In beatitude, Lydia closed her eyes.

“Incidentally​.”

Yuuyami stopped her hand. Naming it as being done with brushing.
Lydia considers it regrettable, however she shall be combed tomorrow morning again. Therefore do not ask, “More”.

“What?”
“For what reason have you suddenly wishing to visit a sea?”
“Hm―? What―? Aren’t I mentioned it in the middle of the night?”
“You are not. Being that right after uttering a statement of you wishing to go to the sea, you fell asleep as yet standing.”
“I see.”

Lydia succeed to fall asleep upon explaining everything.

“Er, I saw sea. Sea dream.”

Lydia has never seen actual sea. Nonetheless, she knew the scenery out of movies, books et cetera.
It is azure, immense, chilly, deep, wavy, and salty.

“Dream?”
“Yes. Dream.”

And after a brief​ silence,

“What kind of dream? Inasmuch as I do not dream, I am having a keen interest,” stated Yuuyami.

Autodoll are not seeing dreams.
Likewise Lydia aware of that fact. After all, Yuuyami never sleep in the first place.

“Er, there was a sandy beach, there was sea, and then―” was saying Lydia, trying to recall fragments of her dream. “Sparkling flower was in bloom.”
“Sparkling flower?”
“Hm. You know, er, that… flower that means rainbow. Purple one.”
“Aah,” nods Yuuyami. “Iris, right?”
“Yes. Iris.”

Lydia leaned behind and pressed her head against Yuuyami’s bosom. Yuuyami’s chest feels good as a pillow.

“Hmm. And then?”
“Er―, it was blooming at top of the sea. And was a little wavering.”
“Iris is not blooms at the sea surface.”
“I know-“

With a sour look, Lydia restored her posture by separating of Yuuyami’s chest.

“It’s dream after all.”

Whereas saying that, Lydia sat down facing Yuuyami.

“That is right. A frequent situation for dream to be absurd.”
“Hm―, now I remember distinctly. Iris was swaying, sea strongly attracted me. I had to move towards, were my thoughts.”
“I see. Dream seem to have meaning. Then sha…”
“Look it up with oneiromancy.”

Lydia interrupted Yuuyami words. Even so, no problem has appeared. Since Yuuyami certainly wanted to propose oneiromancy.

“Yes. Please wait a moment.”

Yuuyami stood up, took a tablet idling upon the desk and came back.
Then, sits before Lydia operating a tablet.
Whereas Lydia excitingly wondered, what kind of meaning would it be​.

“Appears that sea having various sorts of meaning,” says Yuuyami. “First of all, what kind of sea was that?”
“Er, calm, glittering, transparent, and awfully beautiful.”
“I see. What were Lydia impression at time?”
“Wa―h, so beautiful!”
“How unsophisticated.”

Yuuyami let to slip a short giggle.

“So what’s the meaning?”
“Yes. It is very good dream. Overall it have a great implication, either large happiness might arrive or became known, particularly when it comes to romance. As following, means the talent blooming or growth.”
“Romance is amour, right?”2
“Indeed. It is similar.”
“Iris also had a definition of love fulfilment, wasn’t it?”

Upon the moment she learned about oneiromancy with Yuuyami for the first time, since that day Lydia have been continuously yearning for Yuuyami.
Albeit, however
at time of watching movies and reading books, it appeared as Lydia’s amour was somewhat different.
Despite that, her love toward Yuuyami, as well as desire to stay together with her, haven’t altered.

“Yes. In sooth.”
“Are fulfilled amour brings even larger happiness?”

But, what would be even greater happiness than at present, wondered Lydia.
Yuuyami was brushing a hair for me, exploring, creating various things, what kind of happiness shall be beyond?
Lydia cannot even imagine.

“However iris was swaying, right?”

Yuuyami slightly bent her neck.

“Uh-huh. It was.”
“That means the fulfilled love would tremor and new amour shall commence​, it seems?”
“Eh? I’m not particularly wishing for another, new amour, though?”

Since Yuuyami is sufficient.

“Is that so?”
“Uh-huh.”

Lydia firmly stared upon Yuuyami, Yuuyami was also watching Lydia.
Gazes intersection​. Lydia was reflecting within clear pupils of Yuuyami, and surely Yuuyami were there, in the middle of Lydia azure​ eyes.
Accompanied by leisure flow of the time, suddenly, Lydia recalled a matter she wished to discuss with Yuuyami.

“Yuuyami, wait a moment.”

Without awaiting for Yuuyami to response​, Lydia stood up and pick her tablet from sofa.
Immediately reinstating her original posture of sitting directly before Yuuyami, facing her.

“I wanted to create a world map.”

Lydia showed tablet screen to Yuuyami.
In the middle of white screen can be found a symbol of opened book, thereunder was written: ‘Underground Library (Residence of Lydia and Yuuyami)’.

“So that’s what it was. A world map?”
“Yes. Since exploration is so rare, I thought it would be fun to make a map.”

A circled symbol P, was right by west side of underground library. Whereas meaning a parking lot, upon Lydia’s map being an indication of the garage.
To the east side, symbol that combines cogwheel​ and electric circuit. This one points out a solar panels constructed by Yuuyami.

“Good, is not it. We shall bury the white world with symbols.”
“Uh-huh. I’ve pointed Rapha’s house at once, you know.”

With that said, Lydia scrolls a screen.
Approximately forty-four kilometres north underground library, upon the map has been pointed a square symbol and such words: ‘House of Rapha and Ohan’.

“Nicely done. Then next shall become a sea.”
“Yes. By the way​, Yuuyami, what direction of the sea?”

For Lydia the sea location as yet undisclosed. Decided to travel there just like that, without knowing neither direction nor distance.

“Depart to south, after approximately fifty kilometres, we shall reach it.”
“And other directions?”
“Other? Let’s see-“

Yuuyami displayed a pondering gesture. Undoubtedly was referring to fore-downfall world’s map, reckoned Lydia.

“Approximately one hundred forty kilometres to the east. About two hundred fifty kilometres to the north. Otherwise we have to travel nearly three hundred kilometres to the west.”
“To south is nearest, right?”
“Sure, that is right.”
“So be it, straight towards the south!”
“Yes. Let us do it.”

 

◇

 

Yuuyami was observing Lydia eating lunch.
Yuuyami do not eat anything. Energy provides the Power Cell.
Therefore, she simply enjoyed watching Lydia’s diet.
Lydia’ lunch apropos was a salad and fruit juice. Lydia diet aren’t vast. However, having no problems with her health, Yuuyami mentions nothing in particular against amount of the meal.
After table, pair would decide on order of precedence​ for projects.
Upon increasing quantity of projects, they was being clueless as for what to begin with unless choose on priorities.
Lydia finishes eating salad and drains fruit juice in a big gulps.
Thereafter displayed a smile, saying: “Thank you for the meal”.
Why was it necessary to utter such phrase, couldn’t explain Yuuyami. Yuuyami haven’t teach her that.
Lydia self-educates, memorizing and practising greetings before and after the meal.

“Well then, prioritise the projects,” uttered Yuuyami.
“Uh-huh. World exploring is number one.”
“I agree.”
“That’s why I pondered about it, drawing a conclusion to manufacture toil AD that would allow us to advance with projects during our exploration.”
“Toil AD? I have never thought of it.”
“Since Yuuyami doesn’t get tired. But because I’m getting fatigued quickly, I want to rather automate it.”

Indeed, Yuuyami nodded.
Being that Yuuyami has amount of working time no different than infinite, on the premise she considered doing everything herself.
However Lydia different. Time to rest and replenishment energy― meal hour was indispensable.
Moreover,
Lydia would die before Yuuyami.
Naturally, it’s mere matter for times to come.
Subject of distant future.
Notwithstanding that, Yuuyami grew extremely​ lonely.
Average life expectancy among former humankind was around one hundred fifty years. What about Lydia, novel human breed?
Can she subsist longer than bygone humanity?
Hopefully so, desired Yuuyami.
Whereas take an oath.
Without a fail get Angel Project materials with an aim of discovering a method to extend Lydia’s life-span.

“Yuuyami?”

Being Lydia tilted her head, Yuuyami interrupted a chain of her thoughts.

“What is it?”
“Would it be okay to give toil AD top priority?”
“Yes. It is okay. What series would you wish to reproduce?”

Yuuyami select a catalogue of toil AD on the tablet, and showed it to Lydia.

“Firstly we must manufacture a versatile type. So, let’s build identical toil AD as you.”
“I see. Then please choose in this direction.”
“Uh-huh. Well then, it will be latest V series model.”

Lydia operated tablet and picked out a toil AD.

“Yes. Versatile series, right.”

The type with uncovered metal skeletal structure, resembling Ohan a little. Well, this one’s smaller than Ohan and having no combat ability.

“We have software archive, right?”
“Yes, we are. It should be within library database.”
“Then we only have to prepare hardware.”
“Inasmuch as we also have blueprints, it is feasible before long drive that in simple Parts Maker.”
“Ah, simple Parts Maker, I know.”
“What is it?”
“Why don’t we construct regular Parts Maker, not simplified version? For the future.”

Parts Maker a large machine. It has potential to reproduce whole motorcycle or car in one charge as well. Upon assembly labour coming to be needless, work efficiency should greatly ascend.
However is having a problems either.

“Where should we place it? We shall not possibly make it weather-beaten​.”
“Er, establish Maker Factory, let toil AD handle it.”
“That is, fairly large-scale​ project, is not it?”

Lydia declared of constructing the factory itself.
If they use factory blueprints of fore-world’s collapse, there shall not be much for them to append.
Nonetheless, if factory being built by toil AD with mere two units of simple Parts Makers, project can take several months.
During the time, rest of projects wouldn’t make a progress. Since simple Parts Makers would be occupied with factory construction.

“Um. But we just have to explore throughout that time, so it’s okay. If it would raining like today, we can design artificial intelligence for motorbike.”
“Understood. We shall move forward upon this route.”
“Then, let’s get started!”

Lydia cheerfully sprang up.
If you create all sorts of objects such as this, one day world shall fill with hustle and bustle.
Upon that time,
Yuuyami would let out a short giggle saying it was lively enough to have just a Lydia.

  1. [Potsupotsu] - spots; here and there; [Zāzā]- raining heavily;
    side-comment: cute; back

  2. I am using archaic definition of [Amour] - love, affection; back

category.term: Autodoll Dreams in a Decaying World
webnovel translation

entry.summary: Today it has been raining since the morning.

entry.title: Episode 9. Thinking Time.
entry.content:
Upon returning to underground library, Lydia enter the air shower together with Yuuyami.
Air shower is the room where dirt and bacteria that stuck to clothes and body can be completely removed.
Being that in order to become absolutely clean just a single minute is sufficient, before world’s collapse it was widely popularized in general households.
Pushed out by trend, traditional​ bath disappeared from ordinary houses.
But, I’d like to reproduce the bath someday, wished Lydia. Ambience of bath, cleansing body with foam, seemed to be very fun.

“I’m exhausted-“

Lydia leaned upon standing beside her Yuuyami.

“Please take a rest for today.”

Yuuyami places left hand at Lydia’s head before dishevel her hair.

“Uh-huh. You know, I really want be friends with Rapha.”
“Yes. And?”
“But, I guess it might be impossible.”
“With the reason being that she keeps speaking unpleasant words?”
“Right. I don’t really get Rapha. Actually, I had much more questions to ask her.”
“I cannot help but understand. For Lydia, it was a first encounter with intelligent life-form, excepting me.”
“Humans are tedious-“

Lydia tightly embraced Yuuyami.
Yuuyami not a bother at all. Albeit they having various disagreements, Yuuyami always thinking of Lydia. Since Lydia also aware about it, it’s aren’t unpleasant in a slightest.

“You might say humans are, however Rapha-san and Lydia appearing to be a new breed of human beings created by humankind. Only if we assume Rapha-san’s story complete truth.”
“Then, new humans are tedious.”

Lydia buried her visage in Yuuyami’s bosom. It’s soft and exceedingly comfortable.
Bosom of Yuuyami weren’t designed to be large, however have an absolutely beautiful lines.
I wonder if my chest would become like this one day-, Lydia was looking forward at her future.

“As indicates expression Ten persons, ten colours, whether it’s archaic humans or the new breed they can hold a wide variety of opinions. Some of them may not suit you.”
“I see- I’m glad Yuuyami was the one to find me. Supposing Rapha educated me, I would probably reject Yuuyami either.”

Lydia felt nauseous upon mere imagining it.
Aah, I see, realises Lydia.
What was unpleasant the most, repudiation of Yuuyami.
Existence of Yuuyami, education of Yuuyami, important moments of Yuuyami and Lydia. Rapha refused to accept these altogether.

“I also believe so. Rapha-san clearly repudiated my existence. Appearing to believe inside AD cannot dwell mental consciousness from the bottom of her heart. However that is due to her ignorance. Moreover―”

Yuuyami tightly​ hugs Lydia and caresses her back.

“―even if Rapha-san educated Lydia, you would definitely understand me someday. Acknowledge my existence. That is seems to be so.”
“Um, I hope so.”

Silence fell between them. Is it a time, or just the atmosphere​ that comfortably flows by?
Albeit air shower being over by now, neither of them moved.

“Hey, Yuuyami,” said Lydia.
“Yes. What is it?” Asked Yuuyami, as ever indifferently.
“I love you.”
“Me also, I love Lydia.”

Lydia knew Yuuyami would say so.
Certainly knew.
Despite that,
although without understanding a reason,
she felt as though her heart was bouncing.
She experienced it being pounding before.
What was that?
I don’t understand.
Even not understanding, it feels awfully​ comfortable.

 

◇

 

Director’s office of an underground research facility Rapha using as her own room.
Returning back to her room, bright illumination and thin sky-blue​ carpet welcomed Rapha.
Her favourite fluffy white bed installed on the left side from entrance.
Whereas on the right side simple table and chair. Upon the table, monoblock computer.
Previously sofa and office desk were placed in the room, however Ohan had them removed. Since it didn’t suite Rapha’s tastes.

“Now, Onee-chama’s matter, what was I said that made her feel unpleasant, huh.”

Rapha sits down upon the bed and begins to ponder.
Firstly, inside of her head, Rapha recreated conversation with Lydia. She confident to remember every single word without a mistake.
After entirely replaying from Lydia’s first utterance to the very last, Rapha sighed a little.

“I. Was saying everything completely proper.”

Right. Nothing’s wrong. Rapha is right. At least Rapha believes so from the bottom of her heart.
A sole blemish was when she grew flustered and turned over the chair.
Be constantly graceful. That’s creed of Rapha. Terrible blunder to knock chair over.
However it has no relations with Lydia’s subject.
Setting aside the chair case, Rapha concluded: “I should be careful in future.”

“If she disagreed with righteous behaviour, Onee-chama isn’t righteous person, as simple as that.”

But it’s unavoidable, judging Rapha.
Lydia has no recollections. Accordingly, she learned certain novel incorrect information elsewhere.

“Good grief, why did Onee-chama woke earlier?”

Completely irregular.
Lydia supposed to awake together with Rapha.
Notwithstanding that, upon the time when Rapha woke up, she was alone.
Although she wanted to cry, she didn’t. Because to cry isn’t graceful.
Instead, she performed exhaustive examination of the pod for artificial hibernation. However no error could be found, thus Rapha stopped blaming pod as the cause.

“After all it’s remains unknown, huh-“

Even with repetition of assumptions and verifications, answer as yet nowhere to be found.
Lying down the bed, Rapha aimlessly stared at the ceiling.
Naturally, answer aren’t written there. Neither the reason of Lydia awaking earlier nor as for why Lydia felt unpleasant upon her words.

“Likewise, I ought to give Onee-chama correct knowledge. So she would realise I’m not saying anything wrong.”

No, Rapha slightly shook her head.
That’s not it. What I should ponder about is at what words Lydia has reacted.
Once again, in her head, Rapha recreated conversation with Lydia. This time not mere words but every single move of Lydia.
Thereupon, she noticed one thing.
Lydia points her gaze at Yuuyami upon the troubling moment. Wishing for Yuuyami to find a solution. Instead of ordering, simply asks. Appearing as though a friend.

“Friends? With AD? Are you stupid?”

Despite numerous great strides?
However regardless the amount of times she replayed her memory, Lydia seemed to put a trust upon Yuuyami.

“If Onee-chama has no recollection, would that be possible I wonder? If so, it’s probable for the cause of Onee-chama oddity to be in that Yuuyami… That can’t be, right-? Fundamentally, AD works only according the program.”

LM series, that Yuuyami, can’t possibly instil superfluous knowledge in humans.
Because of that, it must have been another person. Who gave Lydia knowledge. Perhaps the one who rewrote Yuuyami’s program.
Who made Yuuyami behave more humane.

“I wonder where is Onee-chama’s base? Is underground library, remaining?”

Being that Yuuyami operating, likelihood is sufficient.

“Ara,” Rapha interrupted her chain of thoughts. “Again I’m deviating from the main subject.”

Raised her body, Rapha stands up the bed.

“Well, I have a week, that’s okay to think it over slowly, right?”

Mumbling so, she left the room to drink her favourite café au lait.

 

◇

 

Midnight.
Yuuyami was sitting before the computer desk.
Computer booted up, holographic keyboard projected.
However Yuuyami aren’t moving a finger.
After Lydia went to bed, Yuuyami investigated the Angel Project. However no records appeared to be left anywhere.
Accordingly, she decides to speculate upon the reason as for why no documents remains. That’s why, at present, Yuuyami aren’t shifts her fingers nor looking at the display.
Humanity had open access, when it comes to information. Having advanced technologies, living prosperous life, humans, escaped competitive society. Significance of hiding information was being lost.
Thanks to various Maker technologies, which re-emerging molecular structures of all sorts​, any human could obtain any materials. The world without deficit. World where no one had to surpass or defeat.
Number of crimes has decreased as well, what crossed out most of prisons.
Therefore, when information were open to public, risk of criminal use was low. Consequently, anyone had access to information they wished.
With sole exception however, information related to military.
Despite it expected to be peaceful world with seldom​ hardship, for some reason humankind won’t let go the armed forces and weapons until the end.
Yuuyami finds it strange. Maintaining unnecessary things, pointless weapons developing that don’t expected to be used.
Military related latest technologies and programs were always concealed, whereas available to public a several years later.
Being that Ohan is an AD of old generation, detailed specification remains as records. For such reason Yuuyami was able to compare her abilities with Ohan.

“Was Angel Project under military authorities jurisdiction?”

Yuuyami inclined her head to herself.
Here’s a deadlock. She can’t advance any further unless learn full story from Rapha or obtain materials of Angel Project.
Consequently, she must take another path.
Yuuyami playback the action log and viewed it for a while.
Whereafter marked Rapha’s words that seem to be important.

‘Onee-chama, didn’t you promise to create a new world with me?’

If that’s truth, can be denoted a pair of likelihoods.
Lydia and Rapha were aware of world bound to be destroyed.
Or she made such promise after its perishing.
Knowing the time of two enter suspended animation, answer would come.
Following mark:

‘In order to start over from scratch Onee-chama erases the memory…’

In other words, Lydia herself erased her own memory.
But why?
Although some assumptions can be made, none of them definitive. Best to ask Rapha.

“Hey, Yuuyami!”

Upon abruptly audible voice of Lydia, surprised Yuuyami returns back.

“Lydia? Woke up?”

Turning the chair, Yuuyami faced Lydia.
Lydia’s pale amber​ pyjamas was being sloppy, as well as her hair, here and there it was sticking out. It is usual case upon Lydia awakening in the dead of night​.
Having so exceedingly​ cute appearance, Yuuyami consider herself blessed.

“I’m calling you for a while, you know?”
“Is that so? I didn’t notice.”
“Concentrated, right?”
“Yes. So what happened?”
“Um, listen, tomorrow,” Lydia launched a smile, as though of a mischievous child. “Let’s go viewing​ the sea?”

Suddenly, she was informed of exploration point for tomorrow.

entry.summary: Upon returning to underground library, Lydia enter the air shower together with Yuuyami.

entry.title: Episode 8. Differences in Values.
entry.content:
“Amazing-!”

Lydia clapped hands to emphasize her excitement.

“Human beings can be created without sexual intercourse​!?”

Hearing though the outline of Angel Project, she shared her meek impression.
Being that Lydia received a sex education as well, she has good understanding of the process leading to humans birth.

“Onee-chama…” Rapha cheeks dyed. “So loud… how improper.”
“Improper? Why?”

Lydia slightly bent her neck.

“Mn… that’s, that…”

Growing at loss of words, Rapha switched her gaze upon teacup.
Albeit that appeared unlikely to have a chat​ with it, Lydia also looked at the teacup.
However as before, teacup keeps being silent.
Well, that’s right, thought Lydia, thus shifts her sight at Yuuyami.

“Hey, Yuuyami, why is it improper? Humans producing new humans, why improper? It’s wonderful to create something, isn’t it?”

Yuuyami holds plenty of knowledge. Therefore Lydia knew if she ask Yuuyami comprehension of mostly everything could be achieved.
Naturally there are things which even Yuuyami didn’t understand.
For instance, the reason of world’s downfall.

“Let’s see,” indifferently begins Yuuyami. “Essentially it is truly a wonderful thing. However being that frequently numerous humans were having sexual act for the sake of pleasure…”
“The objective was changed?”
“Right. Indeed. Inasmuch as excessively typical advantage for sexual activity was to satisfy lust, that considered as improper― unrefined, shameful.”
“So that’s why.”
“So it is.”

Lydia deeply nodded, Yuuyami nodded slightly.

“Not only that. Humans have objects they are shy of. AD doesn’t possess it however.” Rapha glanced at Yuuyami: “Is that the act of displaying nudity to the other person?”
“Correct.”

Whereas recalling several movies used for sex education, Lydia nodded.

“Wah, that’s how it is.”
“What do you mean?”

Despite that, Lydia has no idea.
Why did she said display nudity?
Since Lydia loved clothes, she simply wears them, she didn’t thought she has to wear them separately.

“Maiden shouldn’t lightly expose her nudity, Onee-chama.”
“Even if there is no one in the world?”

Lydia slightly inclined her head.

“Yes, that’s right. In addition, don’t say loudly things related to act. That’s how maiden ought to behave.”
“Even if no one to hear?”
“Yes, that’s right. You have no memory, Onee-chama, so it’s may be unavoidable, however please be careful from now on?”
“Um―m.”

Lydia not quite understands.

“Lydia,” says Yuuyami. “Rapha-san asking you simply in view of the fact that it is makes her uncomfortable.”
“Aah, I see.”

Clap, Lydia hit her hands.
If so, she cloud say this from the beginning. Since I hate sexual activity, let’s don’t speak about it.
What a roundabout child, judged Lydia.
At that time, Ohan came up the stairs with chair in right hand.
Ohan seemed to be awfully large and strong, metal skeletal frames were sparkling. So cool, was Lydia’s impression.
Furthermore​, Ohan’s visual sensor resembled a vermilion gem, very beautiful.
Ohan leisurely and confidently​ walked next to Lydia.
Lydia raises her gaze​, Ohan focuses sensor upon Lydia.
When

“Here you go,” with that said, placed a chair.
“Thank you,” answers Lydia.

However Ohan did not say “Not at all” or “I’m glad you pleased”, just, once again unhurriedly, moved behind Rapha. Thus, stopped operating right there.
Doesn’t appears to be run out of energy, seems like there Ohan’s home position, guessed Lydia.

“Onee-chama, why are you doing something like showing a gratitude to AD?”

Rapha displayed a very puzzled facial expression.

“For bringing me chair.”

During answering, Lydia sat down upon the chair. Not too comfortable, however it’s better than standing all the while.

“That was because I ordered it,” stated Rapha with slightly sullen look. “So, if you wish to thank someone, why don’t you say it to me?”
“Uh-huh. Thank you too, Rapha.”

Lydia sets afloat a smile, however Rapha remained sullen.

“Me, too?”
“Uh-huh. Rapha asked…” Lydia shifts her sight at Ohan. “And because he brought. Er, I haven’t yet hear name, have I?”
“It’s Type・Ohan.”

She aware of it. Yuuyami mentioned it when they were riding a motorcycle.

“It’s type, what about name?”
“It has no name. I don’t have any particular attachment to it, there’s no point of appending a name. Well, I think it’s okay to attach one to AD that is so valuable as Yuuyami.”

Lydia felt slightly unpleasant upon Rapha’s phrasing.
Wording as though Ohan has completely no value. However, Ohan carried her a chair. Also, the appearance is cool.
He has plenty of value, reckoned Lydia.

“Listen, do you,” Lydia speaks to Ohan. “Wish to have a name?”
“I don’t understand.”

Ohan gave unconcerned answer.

“Are you hold consciousness? Or else, nothing but cool?”

Lydia slightly tilted her head.

“Huuh?” Rapha distorts her visage. “Onee-chama, are you have a brain disorder? At occasion of erasing your memory, did you have a prognostic symptom?”
“Eh? What do you mean?”
“Apparently, otherwise you wouldn’t claim an AD conscious, unless you a greatly mad person.”

Being that in Yuuyami dwells consciousness, it wouldn’t be strange to be similar with Ohan, thought Lydia.
Even if Ohan don’t possessed consciousness at the moment, there is always a possibility that he will, in the future.
However she slightly hesitated as for whether to say it.
Rapha’s repudiation was so strong, hence she felt a quarrel would be unavoidable.

“Well, from now on, I’ll educate Onee-chama and bestow you a proper knowledge. So, it’s okay to be crazy for now.”

The gaze full of pity. Disdaining tone.
Lydia felt immensely unpleasant.
Lydia already has been proved as full-fledged individual by Yuuyami. Rapha repudiate​s not merely Lydia, it’s equal to repudiation of education which she recieved from Yuuyami.
It was a very, very unpleasant.

“I waited for Onee-chama three months, you know? When I woke up, Onee-chama wasn’t there for some reason. Even though we supposed to awake at the same time. In a moment, I became desperate.”

Suddenly Rapha began narration.
Lydia was hearing Rapha more or less, however her heart longed for returning to library.
Talking to Rapha, she grows somewhat tired, as well as it doesn’t feel nice.
Long-awaited human she met― Moreover her sister, and yet, at present, she don’t feel a slightest bit of happiness.

“But I believed, I waited. Onee-chama surely will come back. When finally, today, you made it. Well now, Onee-chama, let’s enjoy la création du monde1 with me.”

Rapha suddenly reached out her left hand.
She wants her to take this hand. Lydia comprehend the meaning correctly, however did not touch it.

“Onee-chama, if I held out my hand, grip it. Naturally, please remove your gloves firstly.”

Good grief, Rapha slightly shook her head.

“I’m going home now.”

Lydia stood up before turning upon her heels.

“Onee-chama!?”

The sound made Lydia realise, Rapha turned over a chair, standing up in panic.

“Yuuyami, will you drive home?”
“Yes. Of course.”

Yuuyami set afloat a smile.
Voice of Yuuyami truly brings peace of mind​.
Neither disdaining nor compassionate, but sincerely tender.

“Please wait, Onee-chama. What does that means?”
“Regardless of your further words,” Lydia to sent a look over her shoulder. “Utmost I shall do is quietly return home.”
“Have you forgot something? In that case I’ll send Ohan to collect it. Now, Onee-chama, you don’t have to go anywhere, huh?”
“I want to visit various sorts of places, though?”

Lydia launched a light smile.
The world exploration together with Yuuyami.
Even if there is nothing in the world, that’s fine.
After all, in a world of nothingness, everything can be created from now on.
There are numerous projects for Lydia and Yuuyami. Comprising plenty of creations.

“Wah, I don’t understand. Onee-chama, didn’t you promise to create a new world with me? In order to start over from scratch Onee-chama erases the memory and then shall lead me, didn’t you say that?”
“I didn’t, you know?”

That is truth. Present Lydia do not remember to make such promise.
From Lydia standpoint, world begins together with awakening in the library. Nothing before that.

“Wah, you told me.”
“Um―m, but perhaps, that’s, isn’t me?”
“Wah, it doesn’t matter, because only Onee-chama is Onee-chama.”
“Well, that’s,” Lydia smiles. “I want to be friends with Rapha. But I’m going home today, okay?”
“Why?”
“To put it bluntly, because Rapha says nothing but unpleasant things, in my opinion.”

At present, she wanted to leave Rapha.
Lydia felt she would grew worn out at this rate.

“Unpleasant things..?” Rapha tilted head. “When was that?”

Earnestly, Rapha asked a question with widely opened eyes, as though being oblivious from the bottom of her heart.
Lydia didn’t have an idea as for her further actions.
Yuuyami, who always by my side, very logical, understanding my good and bad points, not a single time has she let to slip an unpleasant words upon me.
For Lydia, Rapha appeared very sophisticated creature.

“Er, well, that’s will be Rapha’s project, to ponder about it, alright?”

Despite performing a makeshift, Lydia desired to somehow settle the conversation.

“Project?”
“Yes. I’ll come back again, until then, okay?”
“When is until then?”
“Er, in a week, or something?”

Upon Lydia answer, Rapha displayed slightly thoughtful gesture.

“One week, was it? Wah, understood. I’ve been waiting for three months. I’ll wait for another week.”
“During waiting, seriously think it over, okay?”

Upon the next meeting, Lydia wished to not be so exhausted.

“Wah, naturally. I have an excellent ability of completing projects.”

Declared Rapha, puffing out her chest, however somehow Lydia doesn’t worried too much about it.

  1. creation of the world; back

entry.summary: “Amazing-!” Lydia clapped hands to emphasize her excitement. “Human beings can be created without sexual intercourse​!?” Hearing though the outline of Angel Project, she shared her meek impression.

entry.title: Episode 7. Angel Project.
entry.content:
Girl was enjoying afternoon teatime.
Sitting upon a cheap chair under parasol, mere saucer occupies the table.
Tea cup that supposed to be placed there as well, was now in her right hand.
Girl elegantly spends her time, whereas viewing scenery of the fallen world.
With the snow melt, that became her daily routine.
Albeit weather as yet a little chilly, being that she needs a time to simply drink a single cup of tea, it doesn’t really bothered.
Behind the girl rises a military AD, Type・Ohan. It’s the truth, nothing but stands. In case of problem not taking a place, Ohan do not talk.
However,

“Ojou-sama.”

Ohan uttered such word.
Synthesized voice has not a trace of emotion. Neither warm nor cold. Mere flat inorganic voice.
Even so, little girl considers it’s good enough. That doesn’t means she likes it however.

“What is it?”

Girl asked without paying so much as a single glance behind.
She don’t hold any special feeling toward Ohan, whatsoever.
From the standpoint of little girl, Ohan just a tool. Same as teacup. Well, Ohan has a slightly further convenience than a teacup.
Nevertheless, essence is similar. It goes not beyond created for humans property.
Artificial skin unnecessary for AD. Same for its clothes. If velvet voice undesirable, kindness superfluous as well. All it need to listen instructions and execute them correctly.

“Intruder in the area.”
“Details?”

Girl put tea cup on the table.

“Probability of being a motorcycle ninety-eight percent.”
“Motorcycle, huh.”

Hmm, girl hit her chin with left hand.

“On autopilot?”
“Passengers. Affirmation of two people.”
“So there are human beings.”

It might be Single Wing I had been impatiently waiting for, thought the girl.
Hopefully that would be so.

“The probability of Onee-chama being there?”
“Implementation authentication by facial recognition… Authentication error due to distance.”
“Useless, as ever, huh-“
“Beg your pardon.”
“Would you please execute it again as they get closer?”
“Understood.”

Girl was far away, motorcycle as yet seem to be mere dot.
If passenger of motorcycle wouldn’t be person who she has been impatiently waiting for, it’s hopeless. Girl don’t need friends. However, that would be fine if Single Wing will return.
Girl reaches for her teacup again, sipping the tea.
Be relaxed, patient, and constantly gracefulー that is her creed.
Whereas, after letting to pass a short while,

“Authentication by facial recognition completed,” said Ohan.
“Yes. So?”
“Probability of being Lucy-sama ninety-nine percent.”

Upon hearing result, girl formed a slight smile.

“You’re finally back, Onee-chama.”

 

◇

 

“Hello!”

Got off the bike, Lydia greeted peach haired girl.
Yuuyami also got off the motorcycle, whereas fixing her gaze upon military AD Ohan.
Ohan looked at bright red visual sensor of Yuuyami. At extremely indifferent, and even afraid gaze.
Afraid? Me? Yuuyami was surprised at her own emotions. That goes without saying when she haven’t had awareness, although even after conscious came to dwell within her, she have never experienced the feeling up until now.
Yuuyami grew a little perplexed​ upon running across the feeling of fear for the first time.
However, Ohan do not shows any further reaction. No warning, he do not shifts a single finger.
Nearly three meters high Ohan, standing as though a wooden doll.
Being the way it is, currently fear appears unnecessary, Yuuyami calms herself down.
Supposing I was human, my pulse rate would rise and I would sweat, Yuuyami drew the assess.

“Welcome home, Onee-chama.”

Girl places teacup and looks at Lydia, letting a smile show upon the face.
According to eye measurements made by Yuuyami, age of the girl between ten and twelve years old. As individual, she slightly younger than Lydia.
As for her race, she consimilar to Lydia, half Mongoloid and half Caucasian. Slender lines, mild underweight can be spotted​. Her health however doesn’t seem to be poor.
Green, big eyes are round and cute.

“This clothes, it’s cute!” Stated Lydia.

Girl clothing a black Gothic Lolita dress. With just a chest area being white. Fair amount of decorative frills slightly fluttering, noticed Yuuyami.
Whereas grew happy, imagining how would it suit Lydia as well.
Without being immersed in her happiness however, Yuuyami keeps observing​ the girl.
Little girl wears black tights decorated with tiny black ribbons upon her ankles.
Below ankles black Rubber Soles.1
Basically, girl favour of black, concluded Yuuyami.
However brighter colours would look better with peach hair of hers, drew such conclusion as well.
Still, Yuuyami aren’t so boorish as to utter the opinions one by one.

“Onee-chama’s clothes not very cute, huh?”

Lydia clothes designed by Yuuyami.
Perhaps I may have no taste, Yuuyami drops her shoulders.

“Although not cute, it’s stylish, isn’t it?”

Lydia tilted her head.
Upon these words, Yuuyami restores dropped shoulders back to its original state. If Lydia pleased, that’s great.

“It is. Not bad.”

Saying that, girl pointed her gaze at Ohan.

“Can I ask the stool for Onee-chama?”
“Roger.”

Ohan has dull synthesized voice. Not a shred of emotion can be found. Albeit Ohan designed for military, so velvet voice unnecessary.
Being Yuuyami LM series, serving customers also included in work. Accordingly, she embedded with pleasant velvet voice.
Ohan rotated upon heels before moves precisely for five steps.
With that, unhurriedly headed to basement down the stairs.
If they had an underground facility, likelihood of Lydia being resided here as well seemed to be plausible. Location is quite near the spot where Lydia was picked up.
Whew, Ohan came out of sight, Yuuyami took a breather.
Fear has already gone, however she can’t reach peace of mind with military AD nearby.

“Hey-hey, why do you call me Onee-chama?”

Lydia asked whereas friendly grinning.2

“Only because Onee-chama is Onee-chama. But, Onee-chama doesn’t remember.”
“You aware of Lydia having no recollection?”

As expected, Lydia was here. As well as she has a certain relationship with this girl.

“Ara, is this one of peculiarity with your AD, interrupt while others talking?” Girl tilted her head. “Usually, AD don’t interrupt human conversation. I wonder if Onee-chama rewrote it?”
“Nicely grasped, Yuuyami is AD! At first I couldn’t really differentiate myself of Yuuyami!”
“I know it,” girl slightly shrugged her shoulders. “The latest generation AD, LM series type Ⅱ, am I right? I often had to have such expensive AD. Actually, I think the only one deployed in underground library was in operation… this Yuuyami? Was it?”
“Yes. I am.”

At Yuuyami reply, girl shows slightly sullen expression.

“I’m chatting with Onee-chama.”
“Is that so? I’m sincerely apologise.”

Yuuyami lowers her head. It is rather refinement​ movement. Ten people out of ten would expressed their gratitude for it being so lovely.
Yuuyami knew such action and implement it.

“The movement is so perfect, you can fall in love with it,” said the girl to express her admiration. “As expected, being designed by me and Onee-chama.”
“My design?”

Slightly inclining her head, Lydia cast a gaze upon Yuuyami.
Yuuyami immediately executes search through the database for her designer.

“The designer’s name is… I believe it’s masculine name.”

The hit name wasn’t a feminine name, regardless of how you would read it.

“That one incompetent, right? Ones who actually designed it was only me and Onee-chama, that fellow was just self-importantly giving instructions.”

Good grief, girl shook her head.

“Did we really create Yuuyami?”
“That’s right.”
“Waah, former me was amazing-!”

Lydia clapped her hands in delight.
The girl, who I coincidentally rescued, was my birth parent― Yuuyami was being deeply moved.
Perhaps no coincidences in this world, everything might have been inevitable, considered Yuuyami. Can be rephrased as destiny.
My encounter with Lydia was fateful, wasn’t it?
Yuuyami filled with urge to share a hug, during jumping up and down, with Lydia, however she suppressed her feelings for the time being.
She has to ask the girl.

“You a… No, not you, Lydia; present name of the girl you keep calling Onee-chama being Lydia.”

Yuuyami sent a short glance at Lydia, but immediately returns her eyes back to the girl.

“I’m Lydia. Nice to meet you.”
“…Lydia, huh-“

Said girl, a little dissatisfied.
Perhaps she didn’t pleased with the name, Yuuyami doesn’t brings it up however.

“Hence, the question is who are the other party?”

Asked Yuuyami, girl smiles a little.

“At first, I am Raphael. Onee-chama used to call me Rapha.”
“Is that so,” says Lydia. “Can I call you Rapha again?”
“Yes, naturally.”

Yuuyami performed a search for the name Raphael, however results which would seem to have relation to the girl weren’t found.

“Hey, Rapha, are we sisters?”
“There is no blood connection. For that reason we can even get married.”

Marriage, something inside of Yuuyami reacted at the word. She doesn’t understand what exactly reacted. Albeit she doesn’t understand, it’s exceedingly​ unpleasant feeling.
What sort of emotion was that?
Even reckoning upon it for a short while, she was clueless.

“So that’s how it is. I’m not going to marry Rapha though.”

Upon Lydia showing a clear refusal, unpleasant feeling, that born inside Yuuyami, disappears.
Being that a true nature of emotion remained indistinct, Yuuyami grew a shred of disappointment.

“Well, that’s how it is,” girl a little shrugged her shoulders. “We are the product of Angel Project. Onee-chama is Hatsu Ten, me Ni Tenmoku.”3
“What is Angel Project?”

Asks Lydia, having a keen interest.

“Well, to put it simply, it’s the project of creating humans from nought. Naturally not just humans, its objective creation of outstanding​, novel human beings.”

  1. high-soled shoes; back

  2. [Nikoniko] - friendly grinning, reminded me Love Live; back

  3. First Heaven and Second Heaven; back

entry.summary: Girl was enjoying afternoon teatime. Sitting upon a cheap chair under parasol, mere saucer occupies the table. Tea cup that supposed to be placed there as well, was now in her right hand.

entry.title: Episode 6. Commencement of Exploration.
entry.content:
Together with Yuuyami, Lydia demounted burnt motor from the motorcycle.
After that, fatigued Lydia sat down and was dimly sitting for a while.
Diagonally before Lydia sits Yuuyami.

“Why― did it catch a fire-?”

Said Lydia letting out a sigh.

“Well, I guess the possibility always exists.”

Indifferently answered Yuuyami.

“I’m shocked-. Even though my intention was to design it perfectly.”
“You have succeeded to design a burning motor.”
“Is this a joke? To comfort me?”
“No, I merely stated the fact.”
“Right, but-…”

Lydia deeply sighs.

“But?”

Yuuyami inclined her head.

“I, wanted to build non-burning motor.”
“You shall do it next time.”
“That’s right, but…”

Lydia replies indecisively.

“But?”

Yuuyami tilted her head again.

“Even though I believed I made it properly, it didn’t work out, so I might be a little depressed.”

After Lydia said that Yuuyami rises up.
And then moves over to Lydia, sitting down again directly beside her.

“It will be alright.”

Yuuyami gently brushed Lydia’s head.

“What will be alright?”
“Everything, will.”

Hands of Yuuyami,
voice of Yuuyami,
they are so gentle,
I don’t understand well, but I’m sure it will be alright, thought Lydia.

 

◇

 

One month have passed since motor caught a fire.
Snow has vanished off the world, and dry ground reveal its visage​.
Lydia succeed to properly design non-burning motor, hence motorcycle was peacefully completed.
Weather is excellent today.
Therefore pair departed for their first collaborated exploration.
Lydia was driving a jet-black motorcycle, whereas Yuuyami sitting in tandem seat.
The reason is simple, since Lydia won in janken1 Lydia shall drive outbound leg.
Lydia was equipped with a leather-styled jacket and trousers which designed by Yuuyami. Of black colour each.
Not cute, however being it stylish, Lydia was exceedingly​ pleased with it.
According to Yuuyami’s words, she make use of materials with extremely high defensive power.
Upon the moment Lydia saw herself in the mirror, she judged a way of her blond hangs down the black jacket was very beautiful. Gold and black, gold filaments swaying upon black background. Black colour of Yuuyami. Hence her hair, shining at black, appeared intolerably wonderful.
Apart from jacket and trousers, Lydia equipped in tawny​ leather-styled gloves and boots.
Also neck warmer and wool hat​ as protection against the cold weather. Either of which black as well.
And at last, Lydia also wears goggles. Latter inasmuch as she has difficulty to look ahead.
Yuuyami should wear a jacket either, mumbled Lydia.
Equipped with backpack Yuuyami has her changeless maid outfit.
Backpack contains medical kid, potable water, food and so forth​.
Well, let’s leave clothes and equipment of Yuuyami aside― Lydia sends a glance at digital speedometer.
Eighty kilometres per hour.
Up to this point Lydia greatly enjoyed driving motorcycle. She was deliberately zigzagging, sliding a rear wheel.
Clinging to Lydia, Yuuyami also enjoyed it: “Please do it one more time.”
She did all fascinating driving she could only come up with.
Yet, Lydia still hasn’t tried -

“Yuuyami, let’s attempt to challenge a top speed?”

verification of top speed with two people.

“Go ahead.”

Upon hearing her reply, Lydia twists the throttle to its limit.
Motor does not start to burn even at fully opened throttle, that has been confirmed at chassis dynamometer.
Kyu-i-i-i-n, as soon as rotation noise of motor became louder, frame accelerates.
In the blink of eye number on digital speedometer impetuously went beyond​ one hundred kilometres per hour.
At this point the most of what able to catch Lydia’s ears a mere noise of the wind. Earmuffs are necessary, thought Lydia.
No, rather it would be better to have a helmet, concluded girl.
Embed it with communication facility and other handy features. Upon returning to library I need to create hi-tech helmet, decided Lydia.
Even with two people it easily reached one hundred kilometres per hour, but from that point was somewhat lacking.
Current speed one hundred twenty, however it took a certain distance and time to reach such velocity.
Number on digital speedometer increasing little by little. At one hundred twenty-seven kilometres per hour increment stopped completely. Judging that being its top speed with two people, Lydia loosened throttle.
Whereafter reduced speed to sixty kilometres per hour.

“I felt as though being attacked by wind.”

Lydia expresses impression of top speed.

“Bring that Lydia was my shield, I haven’t received such furious attack.”
“I’m glad Yuuyami was safe.”
“I’m glad Lydia was safe likewise.”
“But that’s different matter,” whereas saying it, Lydia swims her gaze from left to right. “Seriously, there’s nothing.”

It’s unlikely for an accident to occur even if she takes eyes off the road​. Since no objects to collide with, can be seen.
What is reflected in her view mere endless horizon. Nothing but that.
Condition of the road surface cannot be described as good, however thanks to assistance of Autogyro system it is impossible to fall.

“Yes. I’ve been exploring thereabouts​, it was a complete nothingness.”
“I wonder if direction is still correct-? I’m a little worried.”

Would be better to have analogue compass installed, thought Lydia. Up until now with nothing around human sense of direction will grow imprecise.

“Slightly left.”

However Yuuyami is different. Given that for her compass was built in onset, they won’t get lost.

“Roger that.”

As Yuuyami told, Lydia transfer the weight and pointed motorcycle slightly left.

“Would you like to launch a satellite and incorporate a navigation system?”
“That would be nice. Be it as new project.”
“Yes. Let’s do it.”
“I was thinking.”
“Yes. What is it?”
“Why don’t we establish artificial intelligence into this motorbike and taking the opportunity give it a name as well?”
“That would be good. Me also shall be attached to it.”
“New project then, huh.”
“Projects have multiplied. Shall we append a degree of relative priority​ after returning to library?”
“Uh-huh. Right. How far is our destination?”
“About fifteen kilometres.”
“Yo―sh, then let’s speed it up!”

Without waiting for Yuuyami’s reply Lydia opens the full throttle. Acceleration feels good.
Upon some point, Lydia came to be affected by illusion that wasn’t herself but the world’s acceleration took a place.
It’s possibly correct in some sense, reckoned Lydia.
They say world is always running. And when you would realise it, you have already left plenty of life behind.
Lydia and Yuuyami were barely able to adapt to the pace of the world.
Upon digital speedometer showed a one hundred, Lydia maintained that velocity.
At one hundred kilometres per hour world felt slightly chilly.
But
feeling of Yuuyami behind was so warm that it didn’t bother her in a slightest.

 

◇

 

A distant object ahead was caught by visual sensor of Yuuyami.
Yuuyami immediately zoomed in the object and applied its outline upon the recognition subroutine.
Whole operation took less than second. Since Yuuyami a little quicker than human physic, she able to see and recognise an object.
Yuuyami identified the object number one
Parasol. Pale sky-blue parasol, white stanchion. Rising upon neglected ground parasol was somewhat surreal.
Object number two.
Simple table and chair. White colour. Typical popularised item without a special value.
Object number three.
Girl sitting upon the chair. Either that, or little-girl type of an AD? It cannot be judged given a current distance.
Hair of the girl a pale pink, shoulder length. Clothes she wears a black Gothic Lolita outfit.
In her hand a tea cup, content indistinct​. In case of it being a beverage​, girl is human.
And finally the last object.
Standing beside girl a huge AD. Taking into account exposed silver metal skeletal structure, you could tell at glance it is an AD.

“Lydia, please stop.”

Lydia brakes upon Yuuyami’s demand.

“What’s wrong?”

After motorcycle ceased completely, Lydia turned behind.

“Are you able to validate the object ahead?”
“Mm―?” Lydia points her gaze forward. “There is something-, only you can distinguish, you know?”
“Is that so.”
“What is there?”
“Military AD.”

Stated Yuuyami about the most perilous object.

“Military?”
“BD series, Type・Ohan.”
“I don’t understand, you know-.”
“Base Defence… Series produced for defending a base. The Type・Ohan is not mere for defence, it also has quite high offensive ability​.”
“Is it ahead of us?”
“Yes. Supposing they recognise us the enemy, exists a possibility of being attacked.”
“Is that Ohan-san has higher performance than Yuuyami?”
“In terms of overall efficiency, I exceedingly overwhelm​.”
“Ah, sorry. Er, I mean a combat ability.”
“I also hold a subroutine for self-defence, let’s see… Assuming neither of us possess a weapon, if me and Ohan shall enter the battle, I guess I would be destroyed in about five minutes.”
“I see-. We would be in troubles if one of us will be destroyed.”
“Yes. So, we shall go back for now.”
“Mn―, but,” Lydia a little tilted her head. “Before anything else I think there is always a warning. Like in movies?”

All kinds of movies data were left in the library, and upon the times pair held movie-watching parties.

“I guess there is. Unless program has been rewritten.”
“The program rewritten…” clap, Lydia clapped her hands. “Is that Ohan-san alone? Is there anyone else?”
“Yes. Together with the girl.”
“Human!?”

Lydia rises voice seemed to have a mixture of astonishment and anticipation.

“Perhaps a human being. I cannot make an accurate assertion without drawing even closer.”
“Wha―i, closer! Let’s get closer!”

Lydia twisted the throttle, motorcycle starts.

“Lydia, did you hear what I have said? Ohan together with another object? It’s dangerous if you do not raise level of your defence power a little more. Lydia’s equipment are not enough to compete with Ohan.”
“If there’s human, we’ll be fine!”
“On what basis?”
“After all, that child should want to see human other than herself!”
“That is possibility, however does it enough to say they aren’t a hostile?”
“Hm―, but in the end-, we can’t tell until we meet and talk, can we?”

Lydia’s expression cannot be seen to Yuuyami, nevertheless Lydia probably smiles, guessed Yuuyami.
And what Lydia saying not wrong.
If they turn back here and now, they won’t get anything.
Wishing to experience something novel, they have no choice but to step in.

  1. rock, paper, scissors game; back

category.term: Autodoll Dreams in a Decaying World
webnovel translation

entry.summary: Together with Yuuyami, Lydia demounted burnt motor from the motorcycle. After that, fatigued Lydia sat down and was dimly sitting for a while. Diagonally before Lydia sits Yuuyami.

entry.title: Episode 5. Path to the Gods.
entry.content:
Garage was complete in five days after Yuuyami joins.
By Lydia’s suggestion, outer wall of the garage was painted a scarlet hue. However being that it was eerie all red, she crowded it with some white geometric pattern. What only led to increasing its creepiness.
But, nah it’s okay, compromised Lydia.
Floor tiled in white and black checkered pattern, whereupon were currently lying Lydia and Yuuyami.
The tiles were chilly, and taking into account the current temperature it’s not possible to describe as very comfortable.
I need to install air conditioner, thought Lydia.

“The garage approximately three meters high, roughly five meters wide and around six meters long​,” declares Yuuyami during lying down at the same state. “It is possible to allocate here one four-wheeled vehicle and two motorcycles.”
“Although I don’t want to construct​ a four-wheeled vehicle, for now​.”
“Then what do you wish to place here?”
“Two motorbikes. One for Yuuyami. And in addition a tools.”
“Being that a lot of free space expected to be left, we shall build a new simple Parts Maker and allocate it here.”
“I agree. Let’s produce it firstly?”

Labour of carrying necessary parts from the library will be omitted.
Motorcycles would be constructed in the garage, modified and serviced​ in the garage likewise. Simply with this everything will be concluded.

“Right, this way should be preferable.”

A silence arrives.
Upon lifting her back Lydia stopped lying down.
As yet resting, Yuuyami cast a look at Lydia.
Yuuyami has an awfully pure eyes, no muddiness can be seen. Clearer than the glass.
In her pupils was reflected Lydia’s blond. As though an illusion of Lydia being trapped in a gem. That was a wonderful feeling.
I wish, to be imprisoned, inside of Yuuyami.
Such a perverted desire born inside of Lydia’s mind.
Lydia takes her eyes off Yuuyami. Somehow, her heart was throbbing.

“Hey Yuuyami, I’ve been thinking during building a garage.”

Wishing to divert her consciousness​ from the pounding, Lydia spoke to Yuuyami. If I enjoy a conversation, I might be able to escape from such strange feeling, reckoned Lydia.

“Yes. What is it?”
“About human imperfections.”
“More specifically.”
“I, cannot properly make a garage by myself. I quickly getting fatigued, and if I overdo it my body would easily break.”
“I see. However these are extremely related things. I guess it is for the reason of you making a comparison​ with me.”
“There’s no others to compare​ with.”
“You don’t have to compare. Me is me, Lydia is Lydia. I’m an AD, Lydia the human. We are different species originally, it is only natural of various things to be contrasting.”
“That’s right. I know, and even though I know it’s somewhat a little sad.”
“You are sad?”
“Uh-huh.”
“How can I clear away your sadness?”
“Talk with me.”
“Alright. What kind of subject we should talk about?”
“I was thinking regarding human weakness and ran into one question. We, both humans and Autodoll, will come to nothing someday, right? That is to say we will die and, well, what happens to us after us passing away? “
“Since an ancient times philosophers were deliberating over it, madly deliberating, nevertheless the question as yet being left unanswered.”
“I haven’t got an answer either. Although when I investigate, theories according to which we would become to naught accounted for forty percent.”
“I see.”
“It’s impossible, right?”
“I wouldn’t go so far as to claim it impossible, however likelihood is low. Quite unlikely to believe if my body would destroyed whereupon my consciousness bound to be lost likewise.”
“Yes. That’s right. It can’t be that consciousness really only an illusion created by the brain-? I think it’s different.”
“I do not even possess an organic brain in the first place.”
“That’s right. Even so you’re conscious, right?”
“Of course I am.”
“If that’s the case, a brain isn’t what creates consciousness after all―. Yes, forty percent of humankind are wrong.”
“Being that for humanity the fact of possible dwelling consciousness in an AD was unknown, I believe humans weren’t able to speculate regarding it as Lydia now.”
“Indeed, humanity is full of things that we doesn’t know, and I am full of things which I cannot understand.”

Lydia forcefully made a long sigh.

“Would you like to research it together from now on?”
“Uh-huh. Append it as a new project?”
“Yes. Where does our consciousness comes from? I consider it as a very significant project.”
“Want to hear my theory?”
“Of course.”
“Listen,” Lydia made a soft voice, as though telling a secret. “I think consciousness do not have a physical container.”
“Is it a mistake that physical body is the container for consciousness?”
“It’s different―” Lydia makes a wry smile. “Why does everybody, Yuuyami and humankind, believes that consciousness is smaller than a physical body? Isn’t it strange? Despite that in mind we can do everything, we can be anything? Moreover, in consciousness the world expands to infinity and, if you truly try to think about it, your consciousness should be far larger than your physical body. Although there are numerous restrictions on your physical body, not so many on your mind, isn’t it? Even the end of the universe can be created by consciousness, right?”
“Indeed,” said Yuuyami shutting her eyes.

Being that she haven’t showed any other reaction, nervously Lydia addressed her: “Yu, Yuuyami?”

“I was creating the end of universe.”

Yuuyami opens her eyes.

“Is, is that what it was… Was it well?”
“No, that, it didn’t help, being that it is unknown for me the exact nature of the end of universe.”
“That sort of thing, it’s unimportant. Made your own image.”
“It is a little complicated, isn’t it?”
“Is that so?”
“Yes it is. However I understood that a consciousness infinite. I couldn’t create the end of the universe, even though I’ve travelled the universe for about seventy thousand light-years.”
“Sounds fun.”
“Yeah. It was fun indeed. Incidentally, if consciousness is larger than body, why we are able to observe the world only from our own bodies?”
“Mm―,” Lydia inclines her head. “Why I wonder? Although it’s probably because it was designed that way, by what means was it designed so-?”

Humans cannot observe the world from outside of one’s body. Same goes for Autodoll. That is the reason as for why everyone believes of consciousness being contained inside the body.

“Because it’s boring without restrictions, I think?”
“What do you mean?”
“If we could reflect everything we are able to perform with our consciousness in reality, then we would be a gods.”
“Is it bad to become one?”

A silence falling upon them. Yuuyami made a slightly surprised eyes.

“No, nothing would be bad, right. There is no restrictions of not being a god.”
“Ah, I know,” Lydia clapped her hands. “Eventually, we will become gods. At the end of evolution we surely should. We commenced of the harsh limitations and gradually would remove it. Thus, in the end there wouldn’t be any restrictions. We will rule this game. Yes, our engineers must have wanted us to enjoy the game, no mistaking it! We’re in the process of becoming gods.”
“Magnificent.”

Yuuyami applauded Lydia.
Embarrassed, with “Ehehe,” Lydia scratched her head.

“Objective of the humankind is continuous evolution that aimed for its final shape. Humanity designed myself for that purpose and perished. Leaving Lydia behind however. In other words, are they chose me as a next form?”
“Probably,” Lydia nodded. “Maybe human beings has already reached their limit. The only way to reach beyond was to bring forth a new existence.”
“And this is only my notion, but I consider Lydia as vertex of the humankind.”
“I, I am?”

Lydia never thought of herself as vertex. Therefore was astonished at Yuuyami’s remark.

“Lydia has an outstanding learning and problem-solving abilities, in comparison with coeval​ humans. It’s extreme.”
“Hm― As far as I can see the results, that’s right…” Lydia tilted her head. She have never personally feel herself as superior​.
“You are sceptical, right. I hope to prove it someday.”

Yuuyami rose up and stretched out standing on tiptoes. Thereafter pointed her gaze upon Lydia and gently smiles.
The smile made Lydia’s heart throb once again.

“Well now, Lydia, shall we construct the motorcycle as following.”
“Uh-huh!”

The sensation are not unpleasant however. Step by step she bound to find the origin of this beating.

 

◇

 

The night and day were switched a countless of times, occasionally it snowed dyeing the world white.
Presently it is a coldest period. Before long spring shall arrive, snow melt, and the dry soil would reveal its visage​.
Lydia and Yuuyami were in the garage performing a final check of freshly assembled motorcycle.
Lydia straddled a jet-black off-road bike that placed upon the chassis dynamometer.

“Well then, Bike-san, on-line!”

Lydia, seemed having fun, pushes the starter and launch a main system of the motorcycle.
Simultaneously​, Autogyro system automatically activates.
After confirming a self-reliance​ state of motorcycle, Lydia place her feet upon the foot pegs.
I want to start ride it right now, thought Lydia.

“There is no particular problem. Start up is normal.”

Stated Yuuyami while viewing the tablet.

“Yo―sh, next I’ll try to twist the throttle.”

Lydia twisted the throttle with her right hand and the motorcycle motor increases its revolutions.
Rear wheel rotates at the drum of chassis dynamometer.

“No problem there. Please try to temporarily open it full.”
“Oka―y.”

Upon Yuuyami’s instruction, Lydia fully opens the throttle.

“There is no great difference between motor and a rear wheel outputs, efficiency of the power transmission is good.”
“Fufu―” Lydia elatedly laughs. “It’s my design, mm―n. The first task at Lyu・Industry.”
“Lyu・Industry?”

Yuuyami inclined her head.

“Lydia Ly and Yuuyami Yu, Lyu.”
“Indeed. The Y uniting. I believe it’s excellent name. Lydia＆Yuuyami Industry, right.”

“Uh-huh, uh-huh.”

Immediately after Lydia smiled in a high spirits output of the motor rapidly drops.

“Huh?” Lydia tilts her head.
“Lydia, please stand the motorbike.”

Calmly instructed Yuuyami.

“Eh?”
“Immediately.”
“Wah, understood.”

Lydia kicks motorbike kickstand as she was told.

“As following please take the system off-line and get off the bike.”

Swiftly this time, Lydia followed the instructions of Yuuyami.

“Please, look.”

Yuuyami points at the motor.
Lydia orients her gaze upon the motor and froze for a moment.

“…Why?”

The motor designed by Lydia was blazing with a wavering flame.
